info.title: PayFlow API
info.description: Unified payments infrastructure for SaaS companies. Accept payments, manage subscriptions, handle invoicing, and automate revenue recognition — all through one API. Built for developers who hate dealing with payment complexity.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of customers with their subscription status, MRR contribution, and payment health score.

post.description: Create a new customer record. Automatically syncs with your CRM if connected via webhook.

get.description: Returns full customer profile including payment methods, subscription history, and lifetime value.
Returns all active, trialing, past_due, and canceled subscriptions with MRR impact analysis.

post.description: Start a new subscription for a customer. Supports free trials, usage-based billing, seat-based pricing, and hybrid models.

patch.description: Upgrade, downgrade, or modify a subscription. Automatically prorates charges and handles mid-cycle changes.

delete.description: Cancel at period end or immediately. Optionally trigger a cancellation survey and win-back flow.

get.description: Returns all invoices with payment status, retry history, and dunning stage.

post.description: Generate a one-off or recurring invoice. Supports multi-currency, tax calculation, and custom line items.
Charge the customer's default payment method. Falls back through saved methods if primary fails.

get.description: Returns all payment attempts with processor response codes, fee breakdowns, and settlement timelines.

post.description: Charge a customer's payment method for a one-time amount. Supports 135+ currencies and automatic FX conversion.
Full or partial refund. Automatically adjusts revenue recognition and updates MRR.
Generate a hosted checkout page with your branding. Supports A/B testing pricing, upsells, and cross-sells.

get.description: Returns current MRR with breakdown by new, expansion, contraction, churn, and reactivation. Includes 12-month forecast.
ASC 606 compliant revenue recognition schedule. Exports to QuickBooks, Xero, or NetSuite.
Returns active dunning campaigns with recovery rates, email open rates, and predicted churn impact.

post.description: Set up automated failed payment recovery. Configurable retry schedules, email sequences, and escalation rules.

get.description: Returns all configured webhook endpoints with delivery stats and failure rates.

post.description: Subscribe to payment events (payment.succeeded, subscription.canceled, invoice.past_due, etc). Signed payloads with automatic retries.
Report metered usage for usage-based billing. Supports batch ingestion up to 10K events per request.
